calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-12-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Espey appeared by telephone for Elaine Teupel (Executor).

The Court noted that the accounting is out of balance by $111.00 and that it understands that the proposal is to close out the estate by deducting that amount from the statutory attorney fees. Ms. Espey responded "yes". The Court granted the Amended Petition for Final Distribution, etc. (subject to review of the order). The Court will make the adjustment to the attorney's fees.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
